column8: Moderately strong, brownish grey spotted yellow, moderately decomposed, medium grained GRANITE with closely spaced, narrow to very narrow, rough undulating, limonite and manganese stained joints, dipping 15 degrees-35 degrees.
Strong, pinkish grey spotted black, slightly decomposed, medium grained GRANITE, with closely to medium spaced, rough undulating, extremely narrow, clean, joints, dipping 5 degrees-10 degrees.
